retrieved_result: Ansible Tower on AWS To deploy Ansible and Ansible Tower on AWS in about 20 minutes, follow the step-by-step instructions in the Quick Start deployment guide. For additional Quick Starts, see the complete catalog. This Quick Start deploys Ansible and Ansible Tower by Red Hat on the AWS Cloud to help manage your IT infra
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about deploying Ansible Tower on AWS and does not relate to Docker or Docker setup for beginners.
